notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-368 — now matched to the released app. It includes the auto-pilot deep-audit work (🌏 regime gate, 🎲 risk sizing, 🧊 cooldown) PLUS today's fixes: the autobuy 'finds nothing' fix, smoothed /10 scores, and exact-trade Undo/Delete. FASTER LOADING: beta now reuses your main app's price data instead of re-downloading the whole ASX market from cold — your beta portfolio stays completely separate (only prices are shared). The first load after this syncs once, then it's quick. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load it. Anything odd: ✉ feedback link, top-left.
